creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jason Helfman wrote:
 > From Porter's Handbook 6.11.3 (Java Section): "As for the choice of 
 > building Java ports from source or directly installing them from a 
 > binary distribution, there is no defined policy at the time of 
 > writing. However, people from the FreeBSD Java Project encourage 
 > porters to have their ports built from source whenever it is a trivial 
 > task.
 
 Good enough, patch approved.  Thanks for your work!
